header: Editors write. The theme does the design.
description: Desiderio moves every styling decision into site settings — so editors restyle the site themselves, developers stop fielding color-change tickets, and the brand never drifts.

items.title: Theme without deploys
items.description_text: Preset, density, radius, container width, and fonts are editor-facing site settings.

items.title: On brand, automatically
items.description_text: OKLCH design tokens drive every component, so nothing drifts off palette.

items.title: Dark mode included
items.description_text: Light, dark, and auto flip from the same token set — no second stylesheet.

image.title: Desiderio theme site settings
image.alternative: TYPO3 site settings showing the Desiderio theme category with preset and appearance options.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.
